turns.content: What brings you in today?
I've been getting these real bad headaches lately. They just won't quit. Sometimes I get dizzy too.
When did this start?
Maybe a couple weeks ago. It's been coming and going, but lately it's more often.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
It's like a pounding, right in my forehead and the top of my head. The dizziness is separate—sometimes I get lightheaded when I stand up fast.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No. No fever or anything. Just the headache and feeling off-balance.
What medications are you currently taking?
Just my blood pressure pills and something for my sugar. That's it.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Yeah, I got high blood pressure and diabetes. They told me to watch what I eat, but it ain't easy.
Are you allergic to any medications?
Nah, I don't think so. The nurse once said I might be allergic to penicillin, but I can't remember for sure.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
I just took some over-the-counter pain meds, but they didn't help much. I been trying to rest when I can, but work keeps me busy.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Lifting stuff at work makes it worse. And standing up too quick. Resting helps a bit, but not totally.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
It's making it hard to do my job at the warehouse. I gotta move boxes and be on my feet all day, and these dizzy spells slow me down.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
Yeah, I smoke about half a pack a day. And I'll have a couple beers after work most days, not a lot.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
Not that I know of. My dad had heart trouble though, and he got bad headaches before he passed.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No, this is new for me. Never had headaches like these before, or the dizzy spells.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
Yeah, it makes sense, I guess. I told you everything I know. So what's next?
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically, it's a solid 6 or 7. The headache's not killing me, but it's always there nagging at me. Emotionally, I feel like a 7—it's got me on edge and worried. I can't stop thinking about it.
Do you have any questions for me?
Yeah, I got one question. What do you think is causing this? Am I gonna be okay, or is it something serious?
What do you think might be going on?
I don't know, man. That's why I'm here. I'm just a warehouse worker, not a doctor. I'm hoping you can figure it out and tell me straight.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No, that's all. Just fix me up so I can get back to work without feeling like crap all the time.
